contact.title: Start the conversation
contact.description: Share what you're hiring for or what you're building. I will get back to you with a thoughtful next step.
contact.name: Name
contact.wantsCall: I'd like to book a call
contact.success: Thanks. Your message is in and I'll follow up soon.
contact.error: I couldn't submit the form right now. Please try again in a moment.
contact.callCta: Pick a time on the calendar
contact.bookingHint: Prefer a live conversation? You can go straight to the booking page and choose a slot there.
contact.bookingDescription: Pick a time that works and I'll meet you there.
contact.bookingFallback: Booking is not configured yet. Send the form or email me directly and I'll suggest a few times.
contact.bookingExternal: Open booking in a new tab

admin.title: Portfolio CMS
admin.description: Manage your public content, leads, and settings.
admin.notConfigured: Admin auth is not configured yet. Add GitHub and NextAuth environment variables to enable sign-in.
